query:
INSERT INTO time_step_preset
            (
                id,
                name,
                default_duration_seconds,
                auto_advance,
                record_save_enabled,
                capture_enabled,
                grayscale_enabled,
                result_required,
                result_save_path,
                created_at,
                updated_at
            )
            VALUES (?1, 'Croquis', 180, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0, NULL, ?2, ?2)
